title: Skarten
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Skarten''' was a professor at the [[Beshka University]]. Along with Professor [[Ra Yasht]], Skarten published the book ''[[Torture Observed: An Interview with Jabba's Cook]]''.

==Appearances==
*{{StoryCite|story=That's Entertainment: The Tale of Salacious Crumb|book=Tales from Jabba's Palace}} {{1stm}}
